name: aavenir
description: Aavenir AI Skill Ecosystem — enterprise contract, procurement, negotiation, and obligation intelligence skills for Claude Code. Auto-triggers on contracts, RFPs, vendor evaluations, clause rewrites, and post-signature obligation tracking.

plugins.name: aavenir-ai-skills
plugins.description: Five enterprise CLM and Source-to-Pay skills — contract intelligence, procurement intelligence, negotiation copilot, obligation monitor, and the Avy router. Outputs Aavenir-grade structured JSON that flows back into Contractflow, Obligationflow, RFPflow, Invoiceflow, and AVY without translation.
